title: Lively Smoked Sweet Jamaican Sweet Potatoes Tagine
description: A sour, juicy weeknight Jamaican dish featuring sweet smoked paprika, lacto-vegetarian-friendly, smoked to perfection in a tagine pot.
instructions: Heat the oil in the tagine pot over medium heat
Add the onions and garlic and cook until softened, 5 minutes
Add the sweet potatoes and cook for another 5 minutes
Mix in the smoked paprika, thyme, and scotch bonnet peppers
Add the stock and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs
